problem id: 3ec3f1b4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(2)

examples:
  10100111 -> 10001011
  11100000 -> 01000111
  00110010 -> 10111011
  11101011 -> 10101001
  10000001 -> 10011011
  10110101 -> 01000111
  00111111 -> 11001100
  00101110 -> 11001100
  00011111 -> 01000100

query: 00010000
predicted answer: 10111011
